title: Tonia Antoniazzi - Advice Surgeries
meta_description: Click here for a list of upcoming advice surgeries by Tonia Antoniazzi MP.
text_excerpt: Tonia Antoniazzi - Advice Surgeries TONIA ANTONIAZZI MP Home About Tonia News > Latest News Speeches PubAid Newsletter In Parliament How I Can Help Get in touch Advice Surgeries Wider Support Office Conduct Advice Surgeries I hold regular surgeries across the constituency throughout the year but you don't need to attend a surgery to discuss a case of raise an issue. You can contact me and my team at any time. Upcoming Surgeries Location Date Mumbles Friday 26th July If you'd like to see me at one of my surgeries, you can book an appointment by contacting my office on 01792899025 or via email at [email protected] . Constituents will receive information regarding the specific time and location of the surgery upon booking an appointment.
